title: phyla nodiflora var. subsessilis
intro: Phyla nodiflora var. subsessilis is a variety of the Phyla nodiflora plant, also known as Lippia nodiflora, which is an herbaceous perennial plant native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Phyla nodiflora var. subsessilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
